# core-v1_conversation_list (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `conversation_list` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--conversation_list))

<a id="nestedatt--conversation_list"></a>
### Nested Schema for `conversation_list`

Read-Only:

- `created` (String) Time when the conversation was created
- `id` (String) Conversation ID
- `last_updated` (String) Time when the conversation was last updated
- `message_count` (Number) Number of messages in the conversation
- `name` (String) Conversation name
